questions.question: What does a p-value of 0.03 mean in a hypothesis test?
questions.questionZh: 在假设检验（hypothesis test）中，p值（p-value）为0.03意味着什么？
options: There is a 3% probability the null hypothesis is true
There is a 3% probability of seeing data this extreme if the null hypothesis were true
97% of the data supports the alternative hypothesis
optionsZh: 零假设（Null Hypothesis）成立的概率为 3%。
若零假设（Null Hypothesis）成立，观察到如此极端数据的概率为 3%。
97% 的数据支持备择假设 (alternative hypothesis)。
questions.explanation: The p-value is the probability of observing data as extreme as what you got, assuming the null hypothesis is true. It is NOT the probability that H0 is true — this is the single most common misunderstanding in statistics.
questions.explanationZh: p值（p-value）是指在原假设（null hypothesis）为真的前提下，观察到与当前数据一样极端或更极端的数据的概率。它**并非**原假设（H0）为真的概率——这是统计学（statistics）中最常见的一个误解。

questions.question: Why do you divide by (n-1) instead of n when computing sample variance?
questions.questionZh: 在计算样本方差（Sample Variance）时，为什么要除以 (n-1) 而不是 n？
options: It accounts for the fact that the sample mean is not the true population mean (Bessel's correction)
It converts the variance to standard deviation
It only applies when the sample size is odd
optionsZh: 它考虑了样本均值 (sample mean) 并非总体真实均值 (population mean) 这一事实（贝塞尔校正 (Bessel's correction)）。
它将方差 (variance) 转换为标准差 (standard deviation)。
仅当样本量 (sample size) 为奇数时才适用。
questions.explanation: Bessel's correction (dividing by n-1) compensates for the bias introduced by using the sample mean instead of the true population mean. Without it, sample variance systematically underestimates the true population variance.
questions.explanationZh: 贝塞尔校正 (Bessel's correction)（除以 n-1）用于补偿因使用样本均值 (sample mean) 而非真实总体均值 (population mean) 所引入的偏差 (bias)。若不进行该校正，样本方差 (sample variance) 会系统性地低估真实总体方差 (population variance)。

questions.question: You test 20 different model configurations at alpha = 0.05. What is the approximate probability of at least one false positive?
questions.questionZh: 在 alpha = 0.05 的显著性水平下，你对 20 种不同的模型配置（model configurations）进行了测试。出现至少一次假阳性（false positive）的近似概率是多少？
questions.explanation: P(at least one false positive) = 1 - (1 - 0.05)^20 = 1 - 0.95^20 ≈ 0.64 (64%). This is the multiple comparison problem. Bonferroni correction addresses it by testing each at alpha/20 = 0.0025.
questions.explanationZh: 至少出现一次假阳性（False Positive）的概率 P = 1 - (1 - 0.05)^20 = 1 - 0.95^20 ≈ 0.64 (64%)。这就是多重比较问题（Multiple Comparison Problem）。邦费罗尼校正（Bonferroni Correction）通过将每次检验的显著性水平设定为 alpha/20 = 0.0025 来解决该问题。

questions.question: Model A scores 0.9234 and Model B scores 0.9237 on 1 million test samples with p-value = 0.001. What should you conclude?
questions.questionZh: 在100万个测试样本（test samples）上，模型A的得分为0.9234，模型B的得分为0.9237，p值（p-value）为0.001。你应得出什么结论？
options: Model B is significantly better and should be deployed immediately
The difference is statistically significant but a 0.03% improvement may not be practically significant
The test is invalid because the sample size is too large
Model A is better because it was tested first
optionsZh: 模型B的性能显著更优，应立即部署。
该差异在统计学上显著（statistically significant），但 0.03% 的提升在实际应用中可能并不具备实际显著性（practically significant）。
测试无效，因为样本量 (sample size) 过大。
模型A更优，因为它率先接受了测试。
questions.explanation: With 1 million samples, even trivially small differences become statistically significant. The p-value confirms the difference is real, but the effect size (0.03% accuracy gain) may not justify the engineering cost of deployment. Always report both p-value and effect size.
questions.explanationZh: 当样本量达到 100 万时，即使微不足道的差异也会变得具有统计显著性（statistically significant）。p值（p-value）证实了该差异是真实存在的，但效应量（effect size）（仅带来 0.03% 的准确率提升）可能不足以证明部署所需的工程成本是合理的。务必同时报告 p值 和效应量。

questions.question: What advantage does bootstrap have over the paired t-test for comparing two ML models?
questions.questionZh: 在比较两个机器学习（Machine Learning）模型时，自助法（Bootstrap）相较于配对t检验（Paired t-test）有哪些优势？
options: Bootstrap requires no distributional assumptions and works for any metric (AUC, F1, median)
Bootstrap needs fewer samples to reach significance
Bootstrap can only be used with neural networks
optionsZh: 自助法（Bootstrap）总是会产生更小的p值（p-value）。
自助法 (Bootstrap) 无需任何分布假设，且适用于任意评估指标（如 AUC、F1、中位数 (median)）。
自助法（Bootstrap）只需更少的样本即可达到显著性。
自助法（Bootstrap）仅适用于神经网络（Neural Networks）。
questions.explanation: Bootstrap resampling estimates the sampling distribution of any statistic by resampling with replacement. Unlike the t-test, it does not assume normality. It works for any metric — AUC, F1, precision@k, median — without needing a closed-form formula.
questions.explanationZh: 自助法重采样（Bootstrap resampling）通过有放回重采样（resampling with replacement）来估计任意统计量（statistic）的抽样分布（sampling distribution）。与t检验（t-test）不同，它不假设数据满足正态性（normality）。该方法适用于任意评估指标（metric）——如 AUC、F1、precision@k 或中位数（median）——且无需依赖闭式公式（closed-form formula）。
